reviews.comment:
Impecables los baños, y la atención excelente!! Tuve un problema y me ayudaron a resolverlo, quede muy agradecida con Andres!!  Las medialunas riquísimas!!!

(Translated by Google)
The bathrooms were spotless, and the service was excellent! I had a problem and they helped me solve it; I'm very grateful to Andres! The croissants were delicious!

(Translated by Google)
